description: CompositionGrey striped sweater made of 55% cotton, 20% polyester and 15% acrylic, has a deep V-neckline, long sleeves with ribbed hem, holes along the arm for ventilation, stitch detail along the front, embroidered branding on the left chest and vented and ribbed hemFitRegularWash careHand washDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, or bleachDry flat in shadeCool ironThis season's texture trend is nailed in this luxe top referencing the classic cardi with its plush fabric. Style this soft cotton piece from roxy with jeggings, closed-toe casual shoes and a vintage lace collar shirt inside.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
